description_long: This is a large, rectangular, modular cabinet or shelving unit with a matte gray finish, designed for urban outdoor or semi-outdoor environments. The structure is composed of multiple square or rectangular panels forming the sides and base, with a deep, open-top compartment. The interior contains a variety of small green plants, suggesting it may function as a planter box or urban garden feature. The panels are smooth and appear to be made of metal, with subtle seams and a few visible fasteners or access points. There are no visible handles or glass panels, and the overall design is minimalistic and robust, suitable for public spaces or communal areas.
description: A large, matte gray modular cabinet or planter box with smooth metal panels and an open top, containing several green plants. Its sturdy, minimal design is ideal for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open compartment with a few visible plants and smooth, seamless gray panels.
description_view_1: Back view reveals a denser arrangement of plants inside and the same panel structure.
description_view_2: Side view displays the depth of the compartment and fewer visible plants.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a similar panel layout and a different arrangement of plants inside.
